protocol.name: CATCH-12 frozen pre-2024 selection evaluation

control_side_rules.direction_flip: negative sign(spot_flow_fraction) on the primary clock
control_side_rules.stale_1h: primary side stale by 12 completed bars
control_side_rules.stale_24h: primary side stale by 288 completed bars
control_side_rules.signal_delay_1bar: primary side delayed by one completed bar

protocol.entry: next Binance USD-M 5m open after completed signal bar
protocol.exit: scheduled USD-M open 12 completed 5m bars after entry
protocol.strict_mdd: held path, favorable extreme first then adverse; exit-bar high/low excluded
protocol.cagr: full wall-clock split including idle cash

failures: train: non-positive absolute return
train: CAGR/strict-MDD below 3
train: strict MDD above 15%
train: weekly-cluster p-value not below 0.10
train: mean gross underlying move not above 12 bp
select2023: non-positive absolute return
select2023: CAGR/strict-MDD below 3
select2023: strict MDD above 15%
select2023: weekly-cluster p-value not below 0.10
select2023: mean gross underlying move not above 12 bp
select2023_h1: non-positive absolute return
select2023_h2: non-positive absolute return
primary: minimum train/select ratio does not beat venue_swap
primary: minimum train/select ratio does not beat simultaneous_only
primary: minimum train/select ratio does not beat basis_only
primary: minimum train/select ratio does not beat asymmetry_only
primary: minimum train/select ratio does not beat no_basis_lag
primary: minimum train/select ratio does not beat no_activity_order
primary: minimum train/select ratio does not beat stale_1h
primary: minimum train/select ratio does not beat stale_24h

selection.reason: CATCH-12 failed at least one frozen pre-2024 gate
